title: NTA JIPMAT 2026 Entrance Exam Admit Card
short_information: National Testing Agency NTA has released the Information Brochure for Joint Integrated Programme in Management Admission Test JIPMAT 2026 Those Candidates are Interested to the Admissions in JIPMAT 2026 Can Download Admit Card Check Exam City .candidates should read the JIPMAT 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply. WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now National Testing Agency (NTA) NTA Joint Integrated Programme in Management Admission Test (JIPMAT) NTA JIPMAT 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General (UR) / OBC / EWS : 2200/- SC / ST / PH : 1100/- Out Side India : 11000/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, E Challan, E Wallet, Cash Card Fee Mode Only. NTA JIPMAT 2026 : Examination Details Exam Name NTA JIPMAT

10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

text_sections.section: How to Fill NTA JIPMAT 2026 Admissions Online Form
text_sections.content: Read the Full Information Brochure Before Apply Online Photo Instruction : When applying for JIPMAT 2026, candidates must upload a live photograph of themselves, as well as a recently scanned passport-sized color photograph; in this photograph, their face should be visible up to 80% (including the ears, without a mask), and the background must be white. Aadhar Card is Must at JIPMAT 2026 Application. Scanned Document : Candidates Passport Photo, Signature and Father / Guardian Signature.
